comments.comment:
VOC speciator used to estimate emissions in 2017. US EPA AP-42 emission factor used to estimate emissions in 2018.
For 2017 reporting, the Levelton CAPP VOC speciator from 2007 was used. For 2018, the updated WSP CAPP VOC speciator from 2018 was used.
